title: Montana's Bushier Kelp
description: Changes the Kelp Texture to be fuller! Breathe life into your oceans!
body:
This Resource pack changes the Kelp model to fill out kelp forests. This was Heavily inspired from Awoolanche's Bushy Bamboo! I highly recommend installing Awoolanche's other resource packs, and vanillatweaks as a companion to this pack.

Awoolanche's Bushy Bamboo - https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bushy-bamboo
